github.description: GitHub - search repositories, manage PRs, issues, view code, list commits

setup.instructions:
1. Go to https://github.com/settings/tokens
2. Click 'Generate new token (classic)'
3. Name: 'Claude Code'
4. Check scopes: repo, read:org, read:user
5. Copy token (starts with ghp_)
6. Set environment variable: export GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN=ghp_xxx

filesystem.description: Filesystem - read and write files outside the current directory

setup.instructions: Filesystem access is pre-configured. Claude Code can read/write files in your home directory (~) and subdirectories.

configuration.description: MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers connect Claude Code to external tools and services

step3_verify.title: Verify Setup
commands: claude mcp list  # Should show github and filesystem

step4_use_in_prompts.title: Use in Claude Code
examples: claude "Search GitHub for our authentication libraries"
claude "Find Python files in our repos that use async/await"
